commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining code blockers are narrow and mechanical; contributor-owned real behavior proof still gates merge after repair.; Needs attention: The diff adds no dependency or workflow surface, but unsafe blank env handling can redirect QQBot session and credential backup files outside the intended private data root.; Review finding: [P2] Treat blank data-dir overrides as unset — extensions/qqbot/src/engine/uti... (sha=7e1c5dd68fac6e59026bb135cf7d3db812559814)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `QQBOT_DATA_DIR` override to QQBot data-path helpers, adds platform-helper tests, and documents the new environment variable.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +69, Docs +1. Total +79 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `QQBOT_DATA_DIR` is recommended by QQBot diagnostics but not read by `getQQBotDataPath()`; I did not run a live Windows Gateway reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining code blockers are narrow and mechanical; contributor-owned real behavior proof still gates merge after repair.

target.title: fix(qqbot): support QQBOT_DATA_DIR environment variable
target.body:
## Summary
Allow users to customize QQBot data directory by setting QQBOT_DATA_DIR environment variable. Falls back to ~/.openclaw/qqbot when not set.

- [x] Bug fix
